introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Hello! This is a tool for managing and organising photos.

about.markdown:
# About Photasa

Photasa is a modern, privacy-friendly local photo management tool inspired by the classic Photasa.
It supports efficient browsing, organising and managing your photos and videos, with a beautiful interface and powerful local features, without cloud dependency.

## Main Features

- Smart import and management of local photos and videos
- Fast thumbnail generation and preview
- Multilingual interface and theme switching
- Batch operations and efficient search
- Data privacy and security protection

Press `Esc` to exit
